Auth.title: Enter the analysis engine.
Auth.description: Configure corpora, validate mentions, and version studies before turning them into client deliverables.

Login.title: Noisia Studio
Login.description: Sign in with your Noisia account. Analysts go to the engine; clients go to Signal, the published report experience.
Login.hint: If you came from an internal link, we will send you back there after sign-in.

Unauthorized.title: This view is internal.
Unauthorized.description: Your current role is {role}. The engine and corpus browser are tools for the Noisia team; clients enter through Signal.

actions.brandsCopy: Brand seeds, competitors, and corpora with applied methodologies.
actions.newBrandCopy: Configure Brand OS: aliases, competitors, and base knowledge.
actions.newStudyCopy: Create the container, choose a brand, and launch the Engine to build the corpus.
actions.themesCopy: Theme studies not tied to one brand; category-level perspective.

new.title: New brand
new.subtitle: Create the base entity: organization, aliases, competitors, and initial knowledge for future studies.

form.industryPlaceholder: Search or type: Beauty & Personal Care, Retail...
form.subindustryPlaceholder: Search or type: Makeup, Skincare, Department Stores...
form.competitorsHint: Competitor names only, one per line. Do not paste rankings, links, tables, or ChatGPT bullets here; that belongs in Knowledge Base notes.
form.notesPlaceholder: What it sells, what it promises, known friction, important channels, recent campaigns, legal or operational constraints...

BrandDetail.emptyCorpora: There are no corpora for this brand yet.

BrandEdit.title: Edit {brand}
BrandEdit.subtitle: Update identity, category, relationships, and Knowledge Base without recreating the brand.

CompetitorManager.title: Competitors ({count})
CompetitorManager.subtitle: Editable competitive seeds. Long-form research is kept separately in Knowledge Base.
CompetitorManager.confirmClear: Delete the {count} competitors for this brand?
CompetitorManager.hint: One per line. This creates competitive relationships, not research notes.
CompetitorManager.fallbackClearError: Could not clear the competitors block.

KnowledgeBaseManager.title: Editable context blocks
KnowledgeBaseManager.fieldTitlePlaceholder: Always-on brief, Q3 campaign, competitive research...
KnowledgeBaseManager.contentPlaceholder: Paste research, campaign context, learnings, constraints, hypotheses...
KnowledgeBaseManager.empty: There are no Knowledge Base blocks for this brand yet.
KnowledgeBaseManager.fallbackAddError: Could not create the Knowledge Base block.

NewStudyPage.title: New study
NewStudyPage.subtitle: Create the study container and open the Engine to generate queries, import CSVs, and approve the corpus.

validation.businessQuestion: Add a concrete business question, at least 10 characters.
validation.completeMarked: Complete the marked fields before continuing.

brand.title: Brand and competitive territory
brand.industryPlaceholder: Search or type: Beauty & Personal Care, Retail...
brand.competitorsHint: Competitor names only, one per line. Rankings, links, and long-form research belong in market notes.
brand.marketNotesPlaceholder: What it sells, promises, constraints, known friction, recent campaigns...

objective.title: Objective, hypotheses, and limits
objective.businessQuestionPlaceholder: What decision should this study enable?
objective.competitiveContextPlaceholder: Competitive hypotheses, benchmarks, territories not to copy, vulnerabilities, or brands to defend...

sources.title: Complementary sources
sources.dropTitle: Upload every file that should feed the brief
sources.dropHint: You can add CSVs, spreadsheets, documents, or notes. Up to {max} files per study.
sources.maxReached: {count} files were skipped because the max is {max}.
sources.empty: No files selected. You can launch the Engine with only the brief if you do not have sources yet.

brief.title: What Noisia will use to start
brief.question: Question

launch.processingCopy: We are saving the brief and connecting the Knowledge Base. You can stay here; the button is working.
launch.sourceFailedFallback: This source could not be processed. Try uploading the file again.
launch.readyCopy: The study will be saved, Knowledge Base will be processed, and then you can open the Engine.

progress.fallbackKnowledgeReadError: Could not read the processed Knowledge Base.
progress.fallbackJobReadError: Could not read the Knowledge Base job.
progress.knowledgeTimeout: Knowledge Base analysis took too long.

Team.title: Team & access
Team.subtitle: Invite people, set their role and organization, and deactivate when needed. Kinde only authenticates; you govern access here.

invite.title: Invite person
invite.orgInternalHint: Internal roles don't require an organization.
invite.successNoEmail: Invitation created, but the email didn't send ({error}). Share the link manually.
